selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 一点点, 少许, 一会儿, 短时间；a. 小的, 很少的, 幼小的, 琐碎的, 短暂的, 矮小的
words.definition: n. a small amount or duration

words.translation: a. 红的, 红色的, 红肿的, 流血的；n. 红色, 红颜料, 赤字
words.definition: n. red color or pigment; the chromatic color resembling the hue of blood

words.translation: n. 公主, 王妃, 女巨头
words.definition: n. a female member of a royal family other than the queen (especially the daughter of a sovereign)

words.translation: n. 祖母, 女祖先
words.definition: n the mother of your father or mother

words.translation: n. 国王, 君主；vt. 使...成为君主
words.definition: n. a male sovereign; ruler of a kingdom

words.translation: adv. 离去
words.definition: s. not present; having left

words.translation: n. 王后, 女王；vt. 立为女王
words.definition: n. the only fertile female in a colony of social insects such as bees and ants and termites; its function is to lay eggs

words.translation: adv. 一次, 曾经, 一旦；conj. 一旦, 一经
words.definition: r. on one occasion

words.translation: n. 家, 避难所, 故乡；a. 家庭的, 国内的, 打中目标的
words.definition: n. where you live at a particular time

words.translation: n. 母亲, 修女院长；vt. 产生, 照看, 收养
words.definition: n. a woman who has given birth to a child (also used as a term of address to your mother)

words.translation: n. 狼, 残忍贪婪之人, 极度穷困；vt. 狼吞虎咽, 大吃
words.definition: n. any of various predatory carnivorous canine mammals of North America and Eurasia that usually hunt in packs

words.translation: num. 七, 七个
words.definition: n. the cardinal number that is the sum of six and one

words.translation: a. 漂亮的, 优美的, 机灵的, 狡猾的, 恰当的；adv. 相当, 颇
words.definition: s. pleasing by delicacy or grace; not imposing

words.translation: n. 木材, 木制品；vt. 植林于, 给...添加木柴
words.definition: n. the hard fibrous lignified substance under the bark of trees

words.translation: n. 早晨, 早上, 初期
words.definition: n. the time period between dawn and noon

words.translation: n. 镜子, 写真, 典范；vt. 反映, 映出
words.definition: n. polished surface that forms images by reflecting light

words.translation: prep. 在...之上, 迫近, 紧接着
words.definition: prep. On; -- used in all the senses of that word, with which it

words.translation: vi. 死亡, 消逝, 平息, 熄灭, 漠然, 渴望；vt. 死
words.definition: n. a small cube with 1 to 6 spots on the six faces; used in gambling to generate random numbers

words.translation: n. 门
words.definition: n. a swinging or sliding barrier that will close the entrance to a room or building or vehicle

words.translation: n. 父亲, 祖先, 长辈, 神父, 创始者；vt. 当...的父亲, 保护, 创作, 发明, 培养
words.definition: n. a male parent (also used as a term of address to your father)

words.translation: n. 女孩, 少女, 女佣
words.definition: n. a young woman

words.translation: adv. 不久, 早, 快, 宁可
words.definition: r. in the near future

words.translation: n. 亲爱的人；a. 亲爱的, 昂贵的, 严重的, 急迫的
words.definition: s. with or in a close or intimate relationship

words.translation: vt. 建立, 创立, 铸造；find的过去式和过去分词
words.definition: n. food and lodging provided in addition to money

words.translation: n. 王子, 亲王, 国君, 贵族, 诸侯, 有权势的大人物
words.definition: n. a male member of a royal family other than the sovereign (especially the son of a sovereign)

words.translation: a. 死的, 不活泼的, 麻木的, 熄灭的；n. 死者
words.definition: n. people who are no longer living

words.translation: n. 头发, 毛发, 些微
words.definition: n. a covering for the body (or parts of it) consisting of a dense growth of threadlike structures (as on the human head); helps to prevent heat loss

words.translation: a. 较好的；adv. 比较好
words.definition: n. something superior in quality or condition or effect

words.translation: adv. 平行地, 向前；prep. 沿着
words.definition: r. with a forward motion

words.translation: prep. 包围, 在...周围, 四处；adv. 兜着圈子, 在附近, 到处
words.definition: r. by a circular or circuitous route

words.translation: n. 杀, 杀戮, 小河；vt. 杀, 破坏, 消灭, 使终止, 抵消, 否决

words.translation: n. 儿子, 女婿, 子孙
words.definition: n. a male human offspring

words.translation: n. 步骤, 步, 步幅, 脚步声, 踏级, 步伐, 短距离, 步态, 手段, 等级；vt. 踏, 以步测量, 跨步, 使成阶梯状
words.definition: n. the act of changing location by raising the foot and setting it down

words.translation: prep. 直到, 在...以前；conj. 直到...时, 在...以前
words.definition: prep. To; unto; towards; -- used of material objects.

words.translation: n. 水, 雨水, 海水, 水位, 水面, 流水；vt. 给...浇水, 供以水, 注入水, 使湿
words.definition: n. binary compound that occurs at room temperature as a clear colorless odorless tasteless liquid; freezes into ice below 0 degrees centigrade and boils above 1

words.translation: a. 美丽的
words.definition: a. delighting the senses or exciting intellectual or emotional admiration

words.translation: n. 床, 睡眠处, 河床, 底座, 路基, 一层；vt. 提供宿处, 栽种, 安装

words.translation: a. 快乐的, 幸福的, 愉快的, 恰当的
words.definition: a. enjoying or showing or marked by joy or pleasure

words.translation: n. 马, 骑兵, 脚架；vi. 骑马, 取笑
words.definition: n. solid-hoofed herbivorous quadruped domesticated since prehistoric times

words.translation: n. 疾病, 坏事, 罪恶, 灾难；a. 生病的, 邪恶的, 不吉利的, 敌意的, 不良的, 不顺利的

words.translation: vt. 放置, 产, 铺设, 布置, 提出, 平息；vi. 下蛋, 打赌

words.translation: a. 真实的, 正确的, 忠诚的, 可靠的, 纯粹的, 正式的；n. 真实, 准确

words.translation: a. 坏的；n. 坏

words.translation: adv. 在后地；prep. 在...背后

words.translation: n. 小心, 照料, 忧虑；vi. 关心, 介意
words.definition: n. the work of providing treatment for or attending to someone or something

words.translation: n. 切口, 割伤, 降低, 切, 割, 砍, 削, 伤口, 削减, 缩短, 删节, 通路；a. 经切割的, 缩减的

words.translation: n. 女儿；a. 女儿的
words.definition: n. a female human offspring

words.translation: n. 头, 头脑, 领袖, 脑袋, 最前的部分；vt. 为首, 朝向, 前进, 用头顶
words.definition: n. the upper part of the human body or the front part of the body in animals; contains the face and brains

words.translation: n. 小时, 钟头, 时间, ...点钟, 课时
words.definition: n. a period of time equal to 1/24th of a day

words.translation: n. 陆地, 地面, 地界, 地产, 国土, 土地；vi. 登陆, 登岸, 到达

words.translation: n. 爱, 恋爱, 爱情, 爱好, 性爱；vt. 爱, 爱好, 爱慕

words.translation: n. 人, 人身, 人称

words.translation: a. 真的, 真实的, 实际的, 实在的, 不动(产)的, 实数的；n. 实数, 现实

words.translation: n. 故事, 小说, 传奇, 描述, 阅历, 经历, 层

words.translation: n. 白色, 洁白, 眼白, 白种人, 蛋白；a. 白色的, 纯洁的, 白种的, 苍白的, 空白的, 幸运的

words.translation: a. 已婚的, 婚姻的

words.translation: a. 可爱的, 有趣的

words.translation: n. 甜蜜, 糖果, 情人；a. 甜的, 芳香的, 悦耳的, 漂亮的, 和蔼的, 不咸的, 灵活的, 轻快的
